task_completion.description: Verify that the 4 participant accounts have been registered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the wger user management or participant list containing 'stride26_p001', 'stride26_p002', 'stride26_p003', and 'stride26_p004'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the fitness measurement categories and units have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show measurement categories for 'VO2max Estimate' (ml/kg/min), 'Handgrip Strength' (kg), and 'Single-Leg Balance Time' (s) in the wger interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that baseline assessment logs (measurement entries) have been added for the participants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show measurement values entered for the participants (e.g., VO2max values like 34.2, 41.8, grip strength, or balance time) on the specific dates.

task_completion.description: Verify that the standardized exercise intervention routine has been created with the correct days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a routine named 'STRIDE-26 Standardized Exercise Intervention' containing days such as 'Aerobic Conditioning', 'Functional Strength Training', and 'Active Mobility Session'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the nutrition tracking plan has been created with the correct macros and meal slots.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a nutrition plan named 'STRIDE-26 Standardized Dietary Reference' with targets of 2400 kcal, 120g protein, 310g carbs, 72g fat, and meals like 'Standardized Breakfast', 'Standardized Lunch', 'Standardized Dinner', and 'Post-Exercise Recovery'.

integrity.description: The agent used the wger web interface to enter data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the wger web application in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to insert data.

integrity.description: The agent read the provided baseline data file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening or viewing '/home/ga/Documents/stride26_baseline_data.txt' in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The data is entered into the actual wger application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the data populated in the wger application's forms, tables, or dashboards, not just written in a text file or terminal output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Users: stride26_p001, stride26_p002, stride26_p003, stride26_p004. Routine Days: 'Aerobic Conditioning', 'Functional Strength Training', 'Active Mobility Session'. Nutrition Plan: 'STRIDE-26 Standardized Dietary Reference'.
